channel.title: Conditional Offer on Hello, Conmajia
channel.description: Recent content in Conditional Offer on Hello, Conmajia

item.title: Conditional Offers from Universities
item.description: Offers are reception passports authorized by universities. They are tickets to your future success. A conditional offer, as the name suggests, is made to those partially qualified candidates who lack some of the requirements at the time of application. If you are made a conditional offer, this means you’ve got the potential acceptance from professors but subject to finish tasks listed in the offer. Congrats to you! You are at the front gate of your goal.
